positive: Pop Art style illustration of a cat wearing sunglasses and roller skates, surrounded by repeating halftone dots and bold geometric shapes. Andy Warhol influence, high saturation colors (hot pink, lime green, electric blue), screen print texture, comic book style, bold outlines, retro aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, watercolor, subtle, realistic, monochrome
